name: Pluma
description: Provider of mobile coaching platform intended to facilitate development and executive coaching for millennials. The company's platform offers personalized coaching services, where employees are matched with coaches who have relevant industry and professional experience, enabling individuals and enterprise to build better leaders, manager and colleagues.

name: Prolaera
description: Provider of an educational platform created for Continuing Professionals courses, compliance tracking, and professional development. The company's platform combines a compliance requirement tracking engine, an open course marketplace, and an online learning platform to deliver on-demand training, enabling candidates to significantly reduce administrative overhead costs and develop new skill sets faster.

name: Attendease
description: Provider of various cloud based tools intended to support event organizers in aspects of event creation. The company's various cloud based tools helps in creation of an event platform which is attached with talented developers, designers and managers, each with a multidisciplinary skill, enabling the attendees to receive a memorable event experience.

name: Crew32
description: Provider of employee compensation and workplace culture review platform created to access and compare employee company culture data to industry benchmarks. The company's platform provides compensation and culture data based on gender, years of experience, region and company size, to assess employees values and needs as well as information about startup salaries based on how much venture capital has been raised enabling companies easily see how they stack up against their competitors.

name: Gengo
description: Provider of online language translation services designed to help people to translate all the content in a few clicks. The company's online language translation services offer to upload files or input text, select the translation languages and level to receive an instant quote, as well as offers to give translators any relevant details or specific instructions about project, enabling clients to track their work progress and communicate directly with translators.

name: CourseGuide
description: Provider of an online guide platform designed to be used for the search and discovery of Web development boot camps. The company's online guide platform provides a host of data points and student reviews, enabling coders to find schools for their needs and desired outcomes.

name: Cloud Academy
description: Provider of an online learning platform designed to helps both companies and individuals to learn cloud computing technologies. The company's online learning platform helps both companies and individual users learn everything about cloud computing, provides content and training and helps experts prove their knowledge by solving tests and helps companies to easily find them, enabling companies and individuals to learn cloud computing technology.

name: Proven
description: Provider of an employment application software designed to help small businesses to hire. The company's employment application software offers to post jobs to craigslist and then search, sort and contact, enabling businesses to search candidates directly from a smartphone or tablet.
